target_audience: Organizaciones sin fines de lucro en México (A.C., I.A.P., S.C.) - contadores y administradores de donatarias.
emotional_tone: Corporativo, Elegante, Confiable y Estructurado. (Archetype: Swiss Utility + Organic Trust)

headings.usage: Use Chivo for all headings (Landing page H1-H6, Dashboard widget titles, Modal headers). Use 'tracking-tight' for large text.

body.usage: Use IBM Plex Sans for all body text, tables, numbers, and inputs. It provides excellent legibility for financial data.

surface_strategy.dashboard_cards: Flat white background (#FFFFFF) with a 1px solid border (#E5E7EB) and 'card_default' shadow. Maximum 8px border-radius.
surface_strategy.sidebar: Solid dark background (#111827) with no border on the right. High contrast text.
surface_strategy.badges: Pill-shaped (rounded-full) with semantic background and semantic text color (e.g., bg-red-100 text-red-700) and font-medium.

landing_page.strategy: The Tetris Grid. Asymmetric layout using grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 with generous gap-8 to gap-12. Large hero text with tracking-tight. Ample negative space.
landing_page.spacing: py-24, px-8 to px-16. Containers must feel airy.

dashboard.strategy: High Density Grid. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 or md:grid-cols-12 for complex layouts. Tight gap-6. Every pixel utilized, but cards must have p-6 internal padding to prevent cramped text.
dashboard.sidebar: Fixed left sidebar, w-64. Content area flex-1 with bg-[#F7F6F3].

kpi_cards.styling: bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-lg p-6 shadow-[0_2px_10px_rgba(0,0,0,0.04)] hover:-translate-y-1 transition-transform duration-200
kpi_cards.content: Top right icon (muted), Large number value (IBM Plex Sans, text-3xl, font-semibold), Label (text-sm, text-gray-500), Trend indicator (green/red text with tiny arrow).

alerts.critical_expense: A prominent banner/card if admin expenses exceed 5%. Use semantic danger colors: bg-red-50 border-l-4 border-red-600 p-4 text-red-900. Include a clear CTA to 'Ver Informe'.

charts.monthly_donations: AreaChart or BarChart showing monthly donation volume. Use brand primary (#059669) for bars/lines. Remove grid lines except horizontal, and use dashed lines.

fiscal_calendar.styling: List or grid of upcoming obligations. Use circular color badges (Semaforos): Red for < 5 days, Amber for < 15 days, Green for > 15 days.

data_tables.styling: Shadcn Table. Clean rows with border-b border-gray-100. Table headers must be text-xs uppercase tracking-wider text-gray-500. Row hover state: bg-gray-50/50.

cfdi_module.styling: Use the secondary accent color (#7C3AED) for primary actions within the CFDI module to distinguish it from general charity tasks.

forms.styling: Shadcn UI forms. Labels text-sm font-medium text-gray-700. Inputs with border-gray-300 focus:ring-emerald-500 focus:border-emerald-500.

transparency_report.styling: Include a Shadcn Progress bar. If the bar represents admin expenses (limit 5%), color the bar green up to 4%, amber up to 5%, and red if > 5%.

motion.hover_states: All buttons must transition background color and text color (duration-200 ease-in-out). Cards lift slightly (-translate-y-1).
motion.page_transitions: Fade in content on load (opacity-0 to opacity-100, translate-y-4 to translate-y-0).
motion.charts: Animate chart rendering using Recharts default animations.

icons.usage: Use Phosphor icons (Regular or Light weight) for dashboard sidebars and widgets to maintain a sophisticated, corporate look.

images.description: Mexico City business skyline. Use as a subtle background for the landing page hero section, heavily overlaid with a dark or emerald tint, or as a side image.
Confident woman working with calculator. Use for the 'Cumplimiento Fiscal' feature section.
Contemporary corporate office. Use for the 'Gestión de Donatarias' or 'Transparencia' section.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text on the #F7F6F3 background has a minimum contrast ratio of 4.5:1. Primary buttons (#059669) must have white text.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='cfdi-submit-button').
accessibility.focus: Inputs and buttons must have visible focus rings (focus:ring-2 focus:ring-offset-1 focus:ring-emerald-500).

instructions_to_main_agent: Use standard HTML tags (div, section) heavily stylized with Tailwind for the landing page layout.
Use Shadcn UI components for all dashboard interactivity (Dialogs, Tables, Dropdowns, Progress, Forms).
Build the dashboard layout with a fixed left sidebar (bg-gray-900 text-white) and a main scrollable content area (bg-[#F7F6F3]).
Implement the 'Semaforo' (Traffic Light) for the Fiscal Calendar using colored circles (bg-green-500, bg-amber-500, bg-red-500).
For the critical alert of administrative expenses (>5%), use a high-visibility banner at the top of the dashboard main content area.
In the CFDI module, use the violet-600 color to distinguish it from the general emerald theme.
Use Recharts to build the 'Donativos por mes' chart, ensuring axes and tooltips are cleanly styled without heavy gridlines.
For icons, use @phosphor-icons/react. If unavailable, fallback to lucide-react, but maintain the thin/clean style.
Always apply hover animations (e.g. hover:shadow-lg, transition-all) to cards and buttons to make the UI feel responsive.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Do not converge toward generic 'AI slop' aesthetics. Use specified fonts and layout rules.
Do not use transparent backgrounds under text where readability could drop (e.g., dropdowns).
Do not center-align app containers (.App { text-align: center; }).
Do not use emojis for icons. Use the specified icon library.
Component files must use named exports. Pages must use default exports.
Ensure all interactive components have appropriate hover/active/focus states.
Use generous spacing (Tailwind scale) to avoid cramped layouts.
